steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is "Objects orbiting in the outer solar system," which is plural. The phrase about 2010 BL4 is an example inside the sentence and does not change the number of the subject.

steps.title: Use plural verb agreement
steps.content: A is singular because of the -s ending. C uses singular "is," and D uses singular "has." The verb must agree with plural "Objects," so the base present form is needed. The answer is B.
